user.title: Sesame
user.description: Enter your Sesame server URL and an API token (created in your Sesame portal).

data_description.token: Starts with ses_. It is stored encrypted and never displayed again.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Sesame
reauth_confirm.description: Your token was revoked or has expired. Generate a new one in Sesame and paste it here.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Sesame server.

abort.already_configured: This Sesame account is already set up.
abort.wrong_account: That token belongs to a different Sesame account.
